reviews.review_text: good game, everything fits nicely, like in old times
So far...pretty darn good. Good turn based gameplay, the right balance of difficulty, great esthetic...the joystick implementation isn't the best, but it's passable. Otherwise, spot on.
"The first goal of your life is to try and get a soul. Very few men are capable of it. The second goal is to keep that soul. Because everyone will want you to lose it."
